last_task.subject: [re: #2754] Lightning you think? Curious why? We're building L1 Bitcoin L2 Stacks but think there are fair comparisons. To us Lightning is good for little payments but when things get complicated it breaks down. Open to debate on that fun thing to discuss but also sensitive topic we can win better by showing them how Stacks/Clarity is awesome. Lead by example. Now we could do Stacks Node + Signer + API + who knows what else. Open to all sorts of options we'll make sure we've got compute to match needs.
